description_long: This is a handheld electric drill with a robust, angular body primarily colored in yellow and black. The drill features a cylindrical chuck at the front, holding a metallic twist drill bit, and a prominent handle with a trigger button for operation. The base is wide and hexagonal, suggesting a battery pack for cordless use, and the body includes a side support handle for added stability during use. The casing appears to be made of durable plastic, with metallic components at the chuck and drill bit. There are no visible brand logos or power cords, and the design is ergonomic for comfortable grip and control. The surface is mostly matte with some grippy textures for secure handling.
description: A yellow and black handheld electric drill with a twist bit, ergonomic handle, and a wide battery base. Features a side support handle and a robust, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drill bit, chuck, and the side support handle extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the drill, the ergonomic handle, trigger button, and the wide battery base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the drill body and the hexagonal battery pack, with the handle and support handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the drill's profile, handle, and battery base, with the drill bit extending forward.
